name: LICHEN
description: Generate light chain sequences conditioned on heavy chain input. Supports germline seed specification (V-gene type, family, or specific genes). CDR grafting with IMGT or Kabat numbering schemes. Custom seed sequences for tailored generation. Built-in filtering: redundancy removal, diversity selection, humanness validation (Humatch), and AbLang2 scoring. Batch processing via FASTA or CSV file upload.
capabilities: Generate light chain sequences conditioned on heavy chain input
Supports germline seed specification (V-gene type, family, or specific genes)
CDR grafting with IMGT or Kabat numbering schemes
Custom seed sequences for tailored generation
Built-in filtering: redundancy removal, diversity selection, humanness validation (Humatch), and AbLang2 scoring
Batch processing via FASTA or CSV file upload

heavy_chain.description: Heavy chain variable region (VH) amino acid sequence to condition light chain generation on

germline_seed.description: Germline seed specification: V-gene type, family, or specific gene names

cdr_grafting.description: CDR sequences to graft into generated light chains

custom_seed_sequence.description: Custom light chain seed sequence for tailored generation

num_sequences.description: Number of light chain sequences to generate

input_file.description: Batch input file in FASTA or CSV format containing multiple heavy chain sequences

filter_humanness.description: Enable humanness validation filtering via Humatch
